name: Anti-Ragging Committee
purpose: Ensures a ragging-free campus by monitoring, receiving complaints, and taking strict action against any form of ragging.

name: Internal Complaints Committee
purpose: Ensures a safe and respectful environment by addressing complaints related to workplace issues and resolving them through fair and confidential procedures.

name: Grievance Redressal Committee
purpose: Handles grievances of students, faculty, and staff, ensuring timely resolution and maintaining a positive campus environment.

name: Anti Sexual Harassment Committee
purpose: Prevents and addresses cases of sexual harassment by promoting awareness, ensuring a secure environment, and taking strict action against offenders.

name: Gender Senitization Cell
purpose: Promotes gender equality and awareness by educating students and staff, encouraging respectful behavior, and creating an inclusive campus environment.
